services.name: API
services.purpose: Backend API for frontend flows. In development the CORS middleware allows localhost origins, so pair this with a localhost frontend instead of 127.0.0.1.

services.name: Frontend
services.purpose: Primary browser demo surface for validation. Use localhost to satisfy the API's dev CORS allowlist.

demoScenarios.name: Home page loads
steps: Open the home page in a browser.
Confirm the page loads without a fatal error screen.
expectedEvidence: No fatal startup/runtime error on first load

demoScenarios.name: Docs link is visible on landing page
steps: Open the landing page in desktop and mobile browser sizes.
Confirm the docs-site/docs navigation link is visible in both layouts.
Capture desktop and mobile screenshots showing the docs link.
expectedEvidence: Landing page renders at localhost without CORS errors blocking the main experience
Docs link is visible on desktop navigation
Docs link is visible on mobile navigation
